creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
When I say "builds can fail" I'm referring to building a document, not building the port.  I.e. the dblatex command doesn't work for some documents unless dvipsk is present.

Point #2 was just added as corroborating evidence to show that this is what the upstream developers intended.

Testing on Poudriere now.  It's going to take a while to build texlive, so I'll attached the logs tonight or tomorrow.

Thanks,

    JB
